description: Legal document. Formula of a Bill of manumission of a slave girl. Recto: Recto: A formula writ (מודע, ‘notification’) for invalidating the manumission of a minor female slave (בת שפחה כנענית).  Verso: a specimen deed of manumission, with placeholder names and dates, from Cairo. Verso published by: Friedman, Master and Slave Girl: Two Geniza Documents, Gratz College Annual of Jewish Studies, p. 61-63 (under the number T-S K27.45)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
